questionHtml:
A star has a radius 13 times that of the Sun and a luminosity that is 400 000 times that of the Sun.

The surface temperature of the Sun is 5700 K.

What is the surface temperature of the star?  


A.  4.0 x 104 K

B.  7.6 x 104 K

C.  1.0 x 105 K

D.  1.4 x 107 K
